entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume species Cicer arietinum L. sensitive to cold conditions.

entities.name: COLD CONDITIONS
entities.description: Temperatures below 15 °C that cause chilling stress during the reproductive phase.

entities.name: SEED FILLING PHASE
entities.description: The reproductive stage of plant development where seed reserves are accumulated.

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of seed produced, which decreases under cold stress.

entities.name: MICROCARPA
entities.description: The Desi type of chickpea, which shows lower sensitivity to cold conditions.

entities.name: MACROCARPA
entities.description: The Kabuli type of chickpea, which shows higher sensitivity to cold conditions.

entities.name: ELECTROLYTE LEAKAGE
entities.description: A physiological indicator of membrane damage that increases under chilling conditions.

entities.name: CHLOROPHYLL
entities.description: The photosynthetic pigment that is lost during cold stress.

entities.name: SUCROSE CONTENT
entities.description: The level of sucrose in leaves and seeds, which decreases under cold stress.

entities.name: WATER STATUS
entities.description: The hydration level of leaves, which is reduced by chilling conditions.

entities.name: TOTAL PLANT WEIGHT
entities.description: The overall biomass of the plant, which decreases under cold stress.

entities.name: SEED SIZE
entities.description: The physical size of the seed, significantly reduced in macrocarpa under cold stress.

entities.name: SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The mass of the seed, significantly reduced in macrocarpa under cold stress.

entities.name: PODS PER PLANT
entities.description: The number of pods produced per plant, reduced in macrocarpa under cold stress.

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of seed yield to total biomass, reduced in macrocarpa under cold stress.

entities.name: STARCH
entities.description: A seed reserve carbohydrate whose accumulation is reduced by cold stress.

entities.name: PROTEINS
entities.description: Seed reserve nitrogenous compounds whose accumulation is reduced by cold stress.

entities.name: FATS
entities.description: Seed reserve lipids whose accumulation is reduced by cold stress.

entities.name: CRUDE FIBRE
entities.description: A seed reserve component whose accumulation is reduced by cold stress.

entities.name: PROTEIN FRACTIONS
entities.description: Specific protein groups including albumins, globulins, prolamins, and glutelins.

entities.name: STARCH SYNTHASE
entities.description: An enzyme involved in starch synthesis whose activity decreases under chilling.

entities.name: SUCROSE SYNTHASE
entities.description: An enzyme involved in sucrose metabolism whose activity decreases under chilling.

entities.name: INVERTASE
entities.description: An enzyme that hydrolyzes sucrose whose activity decreases under chilling.

entities.name: MINERALS
entities.description: Essential elements such as calcium, phosphorous, and iron that are lowered in stressed seeds.

entities.name: AMINO ACIDS
entities.description: Building blocks of proteins, including phenylalanine, tyrosine, threonine, tryptophan, valine, and histidine, lowered in stressed seeds.

relationships.description: causes stress and reduces yield in
